channel.title: Get Suntimes on Suntimes
channel.description: Recent content in Get Suntimes on Suntimes

item.title: Versions
item.description: The latest version v0.17.* targets Android 11 (api 30). The minimum supported version is Android 4 (api 14). Note F-Droid provides downloads for the last three versions. Older versions are moved to the archive. Past Versions v0.16.* targets Android 9 (api 28). The minimum supported version is Android 4 (api 14). v0.5.* - v0.15.* targets Android 7 (api 25). The minimum supported version is Android 2 (api 10). v0.3.* - v0.
